mapper.sql: id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time, version
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE api_key = #{apiKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE api_key = #{apiKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_auth (gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time, version) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{apiKey}, #{rateLimit}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 1)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} AND status = 1 AND expire_time > NOW()

SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} AND api_key = #{apiKey} AND status = 1 AND expire_time > NOW() LIMIT 1

SELECT g.gateway_id AS g_gateway_id, g.auth AS g_auth, g.status AS g_status, ga.api_key AS ga_api_key, ga.rate_limit AS ga_rate_limit, ga.expire_time AS ga_expire_time, ga.status AS ga_status FROM mcp_gateway g INNER JOIN mcp_gateway_auth ga ON g.gateway_id = ga.gateway_id WHERE g.gateway_id = #{gatewayId} AND ga.api_key = #{apiKey} AND g.status = 1 AND ga.status = 1 AND ga.expire_time > NOW() LIMIT 1
